references.title: Examining the effect of a genetic algorithm‑enabled grouping method on collaborative performances, processes, and perceptions
references.journal: Journal of Computing in Higher Education

annotations.text: Current group formation algorithms often come short on two main problems: uneven group size and inaccessibility of learner carachteristics. Authors propose a genetic-algorithm-based approach divided into 2 modules:
Results on a quasi-experiment sho that model outperforms self-selection and random in terms of final performance.
